description: Public-clean database of Fable-style agent orchestration skills.
clean_public_boundary: No private formulas or methodology names
No third-party source dumps or reverse-engineering artifacts
No raw session transcripts or bulky logs

skills.trigger: large multi-change engagement that needs several agents and serialized merge control
skills.primary_gate: one PR per invariant, independent review, current CI

skills.trigger: safe reversible work remains after a plan, tool event, CI event, or agent completion
skills.primary_gate: real artifact or gate checked before final report; only external gates stop the turn

skills.trigger: one delicate slice needs investigation, narrow implementation, and falsification proof
skills.primary_gate: think hazards named, work narrow, try proof passes

skills.trigger: correctness-critical slice requiring investigation, narrow build, and falsification
skills.primary_gate: hazards named, narrow diff, fail-under-broken proof

skills.trigger: an agent PR needs both proof validation and code review before merge
skills.primary_gate: test critic and change critic both pass, then reviewer claims are verified

skills.trigger: an agent-generated pull request or merged change needs validation
skills.primary_gate: claim-to-diff mapping plus CI and test evidence

skills.trigger: load-bearing code, test, plan, or release claim needs refutation pressure
skills.primary_gate: strongest real objection checked against current artifacts

skills.trigger: a feature or fix is claimed working and generic green tests are insufficient
skills.primary_gate: test fails under broken behavior and passes under fixed behavior

skills.trigger: a reviewer claims PASS or FIX_FIRST and the conductor must verify the verdict
skills.primary_gate: spot-check load-bearing reviewer claims at current HEAD

skills.trigger: a parallel worker left coherent uncommitted work in a stale worktree
skills.primary_gate: stale confirmed, work exercised, rebased, finished, reviewed

skills.trigger: a conductor is about to delegate implementation, exploration, review, verification, or reconciliation work
skills.primary_gate: role, scope, invariant, non-scope, fail-under-broken gate, output contract, and registry row are explicit

skills.trigger: a delegated agent flags authorized benign work because domain vocabulary causes a demonstrated false positive
skills.primary_gate: conductor verifies benign scope, worker stays within exact edits, and task-relative proof passes under independent review

skills.trigger: a structural decision needs outside correlation without dumping a workspace
skills.primary_gate: small OPSEC-clean decision packet and verified answer intake

skills.trigger: agent session logs, reports, or repeated orchestration mechanics may contain reusable skills
skills.primary_gate: label stripped, closest existing skill compared, evidence anchored, procedure and validation gate explicit, OPSEC clean

skills.trigger: adopting a workflow from another agent system, marketplace, or skill pack
skills.primary_gate: useful primitives extracted, hidden assumptions rewritten, proof gates named

skills.trigger: a public repository patch needs a current-state check, narrow scope, proof command, adversarial check, and compact PR report
skills.primary_gate: task contract written before edits; proof command maps to the changed behavior; residuals are explicit

skills.trigger: agent instruction files, skills, README sections, or fix logs risk drifting apart
skills.primary_gate: canonical surface clear, duplicated rules removed or synced, fix-log entries evidence anchored

skills.trigger: a behavior profile, output style, hook set, or eval loop claims to improve agent operating behavior
skills.primary_gate: behavior named, enforcement surfaces classified, negative controls present, real-work telemetry or smoke evidence checked

skills.trigger: a prototype, MVP, production, security, recovery, or delivery decision needs the right amount of rigor
skills.primary_gate: phase named, fixed floor preserved, scaled gates chosen, deferred gates tied to promotion triggers

skills.trigger: a fix is proposed for a diagnosed cause on a delicate, hot-path, security, or recovery change
skills.primary_gate: the cause is reproduced at current HEAD before any fix, or the diagnosis is refuted

skills.trigger: a multi-PR run will cross a context or session boundary
skills.primary_gate: queue, in-flight PRs, and open findings persisted to durable storage

skills.trigger: before a step that feels like progress, or before holding or stopping
skills.primary_gate: the step attacks the real work not a proxy, and no premature stop while autonomous work remains

skills.trigger: on a stall, and at intervals regardless
skills.primary_gate: repeated patterns named, dropped threads recovered, value alignment re-checked

skills.trigger: a typed contract treats possession of a value as proof it passed a check
skills.primary_gate: both accepted and reject types sealed against external construction
